Mr.. Summers Agreement.


Here is Mr.. Summers voluntary
statement which he placed in writ
ing:


SPOKANE, Wash. Feb. 20, 1905.
Spokane Trades Council, City.
Gentlemen: am advised that your
organization has passed resolutions
urging the city council of Spokane
to pass a pending ordinance grant
ing to me a franchise to construct,
maintain and operate a telephone
system in this system, and that you
have appointed committee to
labor for the passage of such an
ordinance.


In this action you have added
one more to the many obligations
am under to organized labor for
favors received, and | desire to
assure you that, if this franchise is
granted, | shall adopt the same
policy in installing the plant here,
that | have heretofore followed. to-
wit: l shall employ union labor,
work union hours, and pay the
union scale of prices. Yours very
truly. CHARLES L. SUMNER.
